headline: Baker Hughes Shareholders Back Bigger Equity Plans And Governance Stability
summary: Shareholders of Baker Hughes (NasdaqGS:BKR) approved major expansions to the Long-Term Incentive Plan and Employee Stock Purchase Plan at the company’s recent annual general meeting. Investors also backed the existing executive compensation framework and re-elected the full board of directors. These decisions provide Baker Hughes with broader tools to attract and retain employees while reinforcing support for its current corporate governance approach. Baker Hughes operates as an energy...

headline: HP and Baker Hughes Join Forces to Boost U.S. Geothermal Growth
summary: Helmerich & Payne and BKR are partnering to accelerate geothermal development in the U.S. with dedicated drilling capabilities and advanced energy technologies.
